title: Mobs Active Ride│生物主動騎乘
description: Let the mobs actively ride to form knights, instead of only spawning knights when mobs are generated.│讓生物主動騎行形成騎士，而不是只在生物生成時產生騎士。
body:
# Function│功能
**When a mob is around a designated mob, it will automatically ride on it.│當生物在指定生物周圍時，會自動騎乘它。**

## The list of mobs that can be ridden and mounted│能夠騎乘與成為坐騎的生物列表
- Any skeletons (skeletons, wither skeletons, strays) can riding any spider (spider, cave spider)│任意骷髏（骷髏、凋零骷髏、流髑）可騎乘任意蜘蛛（蜘蛛、洞穴蜘蛛）
- Any baby zombie (zombies, zombie villagers, drowneds, husks, zombified piglins) can riding chickens│任意幼年殭屍（殭屍、殭屍村民、溺屍、屍殼、殭屍豬靈）可騎乘雞
- Skeletons can riding skeleton horses│骷髏可騎乘骷髏馬
- Any illagers (raiders, vindicators, evokers, illusioners) can riding the ravager│任何災厄村民（攻擊者、守護者、喚魔者、幻術師）都可以騎乘劫掠獸。
- Baby striders can ride parent striders│幼年熾足獸可以騎乘成年熾足獸
- Baby piglins can riding parent piglins│幼年豬靈可以騎乘成年豬靈
- Smaller slimes can riding larger slimes(Small slimes can riding medium slimes, and medium slimes can riding large slimes)│較小的史萊姆可騎乘較大的史萊姆（小型史萊姆可騎乘中型史萊姆，中型史萊姆可騎乘大型史萊姆）
- Smaller magma cubes can riding larger magma cubes(Small magma cubes can riding medium magma cubes, and medium magma cubes can riding large magma cubes)│較小的岩漿立方怪可騎乘較大的岩漿立方怪（小型岩漿立方怪可騎乘中型岩漿立方怪，中型岩漿立方怪可騎乘大型岩漿立方怪）
- Zombies can riding zombie horses│殭屍可騎乘殭屍馬
- Drowneds can riding zombie nautiluses│溺屍可騎乘殭屍鸚鵡螺
- Husks and parcheds can riding camel husks│屍殼和枯骸可騎乘屍殼駱駝
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
